v1_boundary: Generate Peppol-style UBL XML only. No live Peppol transmission, no access point, no Mercurius submission, no authority or recipient acceptance guarantee.
v1_boundary_warning: Belgium V1 output is not transmitted through Peppol, does not connect to an access point, does not submit to Mercurius and does not confirm live delivery.
legal_regime_summary: Belgium requires structured e-invoicing for in-scope B2B transactions from 1 January 2026, alongside the existing B2G e-invoicing context. The regime is built around structured, machine-readable invoice exchange rather than PDF/email-only invoicing.
scope: Belgian B2B structured e-invoicing applies to in-scope domestic business transactions from 1 January 2026.
Belgian B2G e-invoicing already provides the public-sector context for structured invoice exchange.
The V1 workbench scenario remains a domestic Belgian B2B services invoice with one VAT rate.
mandatory_format: The expected structured invoice standard is EN 16931.
Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 is the default structured invoice profile for this pack.
PDF or email alone is not sufficient for in-scope structured e-invoicing.
Alternative structured formats may be used only where permitted and agreed by the trading parties.
transmission_or_clearance_model: Peppol is the default exchange network for Belgian structured e-invoicing.
Transmission requires delivery through Peppol/access point infrastructure or another agreed structured exchange route where permitted.
Belgium does not use a tax authority clearance or pre-approval model like Saudi Arabia.
qr_signature_requirements: No QR code is required for the Belgian Peppol V1 scenario.
No production cryptographic signing requirement is modelled in the Belgian V1 pack.
retention_or_audit_notes: The audit trail should record the source upload, canonical invoice JSON, selected pack version, validation results, warnings and generated artefact hashes.
Official artefact validation must remain not configured until complete validator artefacts are installed and run.
v1_app_capability: Milestone 1 loads this pack, validates workbook scaffolding, builds canonical invoice JSON and previews the evidence bundle skeleton.
Belgium XML generation is intentionally not implemented in Milestone 1.
No Peppol transmission, access point connection or Mercurius submission is available in this app.

official_sources.label: Belgium e-invoicing build pack source inventory

boundary_highlights: No access point or Mercurius submission.
